title: coronilla talaverae
intro: Coronilla talaverae, also known as Talavera crown-vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Pyrenees. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Coronilla talaverae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Coronilla talaverae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
